description: Robustness benchmark for sf-docs. These cases should not return a confident grounded answer from the wrong official guide.

cases.query: Find official Salesforce documentation for System.FooBarBaz.
Find official Salesforce documentation for NotARealClass__c.invokeMagic().
Find official Salesforce documentation explaining Stripe bearer token authentication.
Find official Salesforce documentation for SAP BAPI integration over RFC.
Find official Salesforce documentation for System.StubProvidr.
Find official Salesforce docs for token.
Find official Salesforce documentation for System.NullPointerException: Attempt to de-reference a null object in FooController line 91.
Find official Salesforce docs for messaging domain security and allowed origins.
